title: commelina leiandra
intro: Commelina leiandra, also known as Asiatic dayflower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Commelina leiandra include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and aiding in the management of diabetes. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
